reasoning: The control CM-6(2) focuses on responding to unauthorized changes in configuration settings. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to several areas: using admission controllers to detect and prevent unauthorized changes, leveraging audit logs to alert on unauthorized changes, ensuring RBAC policies are in place to detect unauthorized role changes, and using etcd integrity checks to ensure configuration data has not been tampered with.
